tasks.description: Conduct market attractiveness scoring for EU and MENA, evaluating TAM, growth, competition, and CAC/LTV assumptions.
Define Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) segmentation by region (enterprise/mid-market, target industries) for EU and MENA.
Formulate entry mode recommendations (direct sales vs. partners vs. hybrid) for EU and MENA regions.
Perform regulatory landscape review covering GDPR, data residency, AI Act implications, and local labor/tax constraints in EU and MENA.
Adapt contracts and terms (DPA, MSA, privacy policies) for regional compliance and clauses.
Establish a risk register with owner, severity, and mitigation plans covering legal, security, reputational, and operational risks.
Define localization scope including language, UX, onboarding, and support flows for EU and MENA.
Perform regional integration compatibility checks for payment processing, identity, and communication APIs.
Validate system reliability and SLA constraints (latency, uptime expectations) for the new regions.
Establish regional pricing models using currency, willingness-to-pay, and competitor benchmarking.
Simulate unit economics (gross margin, support burden, payback periods, sensitivity analysis) under regional pricing models.
Draft final packaging decision memo detailing product tiers, add-ons, and discount policies.
Draft messaging architecture defining persona-level value propositions and launch positioning.
Develop demand generation plan specifying channel mix, campaign calendar, and budget allocation.
Create sales enablement assets including regional battlecards, objection handling playbooks, and discovery scripts.
Shortlist local partner/channel opportunities and design outreach campaigns.
Mandatory Go/No-Go Launch Approval Gate. Review all strategy, compliance, risk, localization, economics, and GTM outputs.
Synthesize the final Launch Runbook detailing owners, timeline, cross-functional cutover checklists, and dependencies.
Assess and build customer support readiness, including localized knowledge base, escalation paths, and support SLAs.
Instrument KPIs for regional telemetry (pipeline, conversion rates, retention, CAC) in the production environment.
Conduct 30-day post-launch performance review using regional KPI and telemetry outputs.
Perform root-cause analysis for any missed performance targets or process gaps identified in the 30-day review.
Replan the product backlog and launch schedule for Iteration 2 optimization.
